error_no_file: ✗ Download failed. Contact support if this persists.

help_menu: 🎵 Jatt Music Bot · Help Select a category below to view commands.
help_admins: ⚙️ Admin Commands /pause — Pause stream /resume — Resume stream /skip — Skip to next track /stop — End stream & clear queue /seek [s] — Jump forward N seconds /seekback [s] — Jump back N seconds /reload — Refresh admin cache
help_auth: 🔑 Auth Commands Authorized users can control the bot without being admin. /auth [reply] — Authorize a user /unauth [reply] — Remove authorization /authlist — List authorized users
help_blist: ⛔ Blacklist /blacklist [id] — Block a chat or user /unblacklist [id] — Unblock a chat or user
help_lang: 🌐 Language /lang — Change the bot language for this chat Supports 13 languages including English, Hindi, Punjabi, Arabic, and more.
help_ping: 📊 Info & Status /ping — Bot latency and system status /stats — Bot statistics and metrics
help_play: 🎵 Play Commands /play [query/URL] — Stream audio /vplay [query/URL] — Stream video Add -f or use /playforce to skip current /search [query] — Pick from search results /nowplaying — Now playing card /queue — View full queue /clearqueue /cq — Clear queue /shuffle — Shuffle queue /skipto [pos] — Jump to position /move [from] [to] — Reorder tracks /remove [pos] — Remove a track /volume [1-200] — Set volume /voteskip /vs — Vote to skip /save — Save track to DM /history — Recently played /top — Most played tracks /queuetime — Remaining queue time /songinfo /si — Track metadata /replay5 — Rewind 5 seconds /prev — Previous track /autoplay — Auto-queue related tracks /mymix [song] — Personal mix /schedule [HH:MM] [song] — Schedule a track
help_queue: 📋 Queue Commands /queue — View queue /clearqueue /cq — Clear queue /shuffle — Shuffle queue /move [from] [to] — Reorder a track /remove [pos] — Remove a track /skipto [pos] — Skip to position /history — Recently played /top — Most played
help_stats: 📊 Statistics /stats — System & bot metrics /mystats — Your personal play stats
help_sudo: 🔧 Sudo Commands /activevc — List active streams /broadcast — Broadcast a message /eval — Execute Python code /logs — Fetch log file /restart — Restart bot /addsudo — Add sudo user /rmsudo — Remove sudo user /maintenance — Toggle maintenance mode /setprefix [char] — Set command prefix /botstats — Global play statistics
ping_pong: 🎵 Jatt Music Bot · Status ◈ Latency — {0} ms ◈ Uptime — {1} ◈ CPU — {2}% ◈ RAM — {3}% ◈ Disk — {4}% ◈ VC Ping — {5} ms

start_pm: 👋 Hey {0}! Welcome to {1} The fastest Telegram music bot — stream any song in seconds. 🎵 YouTube audio & video playback 📋 Smart queue with shuffle & reorder 🎮 Music quiz game with leaderboards 🎛️ Real-time audio effects 🌐 13 languages supported Add me to a group and use /play to start!

help_effects: 🎛️ Audio Effects /speed [0.5-2.0] — Playback speed /bass [1-10] — Bass boost /nightcore — Nightcore preset /mono — Mono output /3d — 3D surround sound /reverb — Echo & reverb /cleareffects — Remove all effects
help_limits: ⚙️ Admin Limits /setlimit [mins] — Max track duration /setqueue [n] — Max queue size /queuelock — Admin-only queue /autoplay — Auto-queue toggle /localban [reply] — Ban user from bot here /localunban [reply] — Unban user /localbans — List local bans
help_game: 🎮 Music Quiz Listen to a clip in VC and guess the song! /startgame [genre] [rounds] — Start quiz /stopgame — End game /score — Current session scores /leaderboard /lb — All-time leaderboard /genres — List all genres /gameskip /gs — Skip current round 🏅 Scoring — +1 correct · +1 speed bonus · +1 streak
